topic: Practical OpenAI and ChatGPT usage patterns, real use cases

entries.q: What is the OpenAI Cookbook and where can I find it
entries.a: The OpenAI Cookbook is a resource for example code and guides on using the OpenAI API, and it can be found at cookbook.openai.com

entries.q: What do I need to run the examples in the OpenAI Cookbook
entries.a: To run the examples, you need an OpenAI account and an associated API key

entries.q: How can I store my OpenAI API key for use in code examples
entries.a: You can store your OpenAI API key as an environment variable called OPENAI_API_KEY or in an .env file at the root of your repository

entries.q: What programming language are most code examples in the OpenAI Cookbook written in
entries.a: Most code examples in the OpenAI Cookbook are written in Python

entries.q: Can I apply the concepts from the OpenAI Cookbook to other programming languages
entries.a: Yes, the concepts from the OpenAI Cookbook can be applied to any programming language

entries.q: What type of license does the OpenAI Cookbook use
entries.a: The OpenAI Cookbook uses the MIT License

entries.q: Where can I find additional resources for learning about OpenAI and the OpenAI API
entries.a: Additional resources can be found on the OpenAI Cookbook website, including related resources from around the web
